message:
The other day, I was in the kitchen whipping up dinner when my partner walked in, looking a bit smug. He had just finished installing our new smoke alarms – something we had talked about for ages. "See? Now we’re officially fire-safe!" he said with a grin. I rolled my eyes and joked about being overly cautious, but deep down, I was relieved. Just a few days later, I accidentally burned the garlic bread (don’t judge me!). As the smoke filled the kitchen, those alarms went off like a charm. 

In that moment, I realized the importance of being prepared – not just for the big emergencies, but for everyday mishaps too. It’s a good reminder that having a plan and the right tools can make all the difference. 

Have you ever had a ‘I told you so’ moment that turned out to be a blessing in disguise?
